queries.question: For each amusement park, show the rides that they have.
queries.sql: select amusement_parks.name , rides.ride_name from Amusement_Parks_Rides join Rides on Amusement_Parks_Rides.rides_id = Rides.id join Amusement_Parks on Amusement_Parks_Rides.amusement_park_id = Amusement_Parks.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?ride_name WHERE {
  ?amusement_parks_rides a :Amusement_Parks_Rides .
  ?rides a :Rides .
  ?amusement_parks_rides p:hasRides ?rides .
  ?amusement_parks a :Amusement_Parks .
  ?amusement_parks_rides p:hasAmusement_Parks ?amusement_parks .
  ?amusement_parks p:name ?name .
  ?rides p:ride_name ?ride_name .
}

queries.question: Which rides do all amusement parks have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Rides.ride_name  from Amusement_Parks_Rides join Rides on Amusement_Parks_Rides.rides_id = Rides.id join Amusement_Parks on Amusement_Parks_Rides.amusement_park_id = Amusement_Parks.id   GROUP BY Amusement_Parks_Rides.rides_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Amusement_Parks_Rides.amusement_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Amusement_Parks)

queries.question: Give me the names and types of the rides that every amusement park has.
queries.sql: SELECT Rides.ride_name, Rides.ride_type  from Amusement_Parks_Rides join Rides on Amusement_Parks_Rides.rides_id = Rides.id join Amusement_Parks on Amusement_Parks_Rides.amusement_park_id = Amusement_Parks.id   GROUP BY Amusement_Parks_Rides.rides_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Amusement_Parks_Rides.amusement_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Amusement_Parks)

queries.question: Give me the names and types of the rides that every amusement park has.
queries.sql: select amusement_parks.name , rides.ride_name , rides.ride_type from Amusement_Parks_Rides join Rides on Amusement_Parks_Rides.rides_id = Rides.id join Amusement_Parks on Amusement_Parks_Rides.amusement_park_id = Amusement_Parks.id

  ?amusement_parks_rides p:hasRides ?rides .
  ?amusement_parks a :Amusement_Parks .
  ?amusement_parks_rides p:hasAmusement_Parks ?amusement_parks .
  ?amusement_parks p:name ?name .

queries.question: What ride type is equally present at all amusement parks?
queries.sql: SELECT Rides.ride_type  from Amusement_Parks_Rides join Rides on Amusement_Parks_Rides.rides_id = Rides.id join Amusement_Parks on Amusement_Parks_Rides.amusement_park_id = Amusement_Parks.id   GROUP BY Amusement_Parks_Rides.rides_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Amusement_Parks_Rides.amusement_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Amusement_Parks)

queries.question: What ride types are there at every amusement park?

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the rides that each amusement park has.
What ride types are there at every amusement park?
Give me the names and types of the rides that every amusement park has.
